BG_11.015.canonical_text: paśyāmi devāṃs tava deva dehe sarvāṃs tathā bhūtaviśeṣasaṅgān | | brahmāṇam īśaṃ kamalāsanastham ṛṣīṃś ca sarvān uragāṃś ca dīptān ||

BG_11.017.canonical_text: kirīṭinaṃ gadinaṃ cakriṇaṃ ca tejorāśiṃ sarvato dīptim antam | | paśyāmi tvā durnirīkṣaṃ samantād dīptānalārkadyutim aprameyam ||

BG_11.018.canonical_text: tvam akṣaraṃ paramaṃ veditavyaṃ tvam asya viśvasya paraṃ nidhānam | | tvam avyayaḥ śāśvatadharmagoptā sanātanas tvaṃ puruṣo mato me ||

BG_11.019.canonical_text: anādimadhyāntam anantavīryam anantabāhuṃ śaśisūryanetram | | paśyāmi tvā dīptahutāśavaktraṃ svatejasā viśvam idaṃ tapantam ||

BG_11.020.canonical_text: dyāvāpṛthivyor idam antaraṃ hi vyāptaṃ tvayaikena diśaś ca sarvāḥ | | dṛṣṭvādbhutaṃ rūpam ugraṃ tad evaṃ lokatrayaṃ pravyathitaṃ mahātman ||

BG_11.021.canonical_text: amī hi tvā surasaṅghā viśanti kecid bhītāḥ prāñjalayo gṛṇanti | | svastīty uktvā maharṣisiddhasaṅghāḥ stuvanti tvāṃ stutibhiḥ puṣkalābhiḥ ||

BG_11.023.canonical_text: rūpaṃ mahat te bahuvaktranetraṃ mahābāho bahubāhūrupādam | | bahūdaraṃ bahudaṃṣṭrākarālaṃ dṛṣṭvā lokāḥ pravyathitās tathāham ||

BG_11.024.canonical_text: nabhasspṛśaṃ dīptam anekavarṇaṃ vyāttānanaṃ dīptaviśālanetram | | dṛsṭvā hi tvā pravyathitāntarātmā dhṛtiṃ na vindāmi śamaṃ ca viṣṇo ||

BG_11.025.canonical_text: daṃṣṭrākarālāni ca te mukhāni dṛṣṭvaiva kālānalasannibhāni | | diśo na jāne na labhe ca śarma prasīda deveśa jagannivāsa ||

BG_11.027.canonical_text: vaktrāṇi te tvaramāṇā viśanti daṃṣṭrākarālāni bhayānakāni | | kecid vilagnā daśanāntareṣu saṃdṛśyante cūrṇitair uttamāṅgaiḥ ||

BG_11.029.canonical_text: yathā pradīptajvalanaṃ pataṅgā viśanti nāśāya samṛddhavegāḥ | | tathaiva nāśāya viśanti lokās tavāpi vaktrāṇi samṛddhavegāḥ ||

variants.reading_b: yathā pradīptaṃ jvalanaṃ pataṅgā | viśanti nāśāya samṛddha-vegāḥ | | tathaiva nāśāya viśanti lokās | tavāpi vaktrāṇi samṛddha-vegāḥ

BG_11.030.canonical_text: lelihyase grasamānaḥ samantāl lokān samagrān vadanair jvaladbhiḥ | | tejobhir āpūrya jagat samagraṃ bhāsas tavogrāḥ pratapanti viṣṇo ||

variants.reading_a: lelihyase grasamānaḥ samantāl lokān samagrān vadanair jvaladbhiḥ | | tejobhir āpūrya jagat samagraṃ bhāsas tavogrāḥ pratapanti viṣṇo ||

BG_11.031.canonical_text: ākhyāhi me ko bhavān ugrarūpo namo 'stu te devavara prasīda | | vijñātum icchāmi bhavantam ādyaṃ na hi prajānāmi tava pravṛttim ||

variants.reading_a: ākhyāhi me ko bhavān ugrarūpo namo 'stu te devavara prasīda | | vijñātum icchāmi bhavantam ādyaṃ na hi prajānāmi tava pravṛttim ||

BG_11.032.canonical_text: kālo 'smi lokakṣayakṛt pravṛddho lokān samāhartum iha pravṛttaḥ | | ṛte 'pi tvā na bhaviṣyanti sarve ye 'vasthitāḥ pratyanīkeṣu yodhāḥ ||

variants.reading_a: kālo 'smi lokakṣayakṛt pravṛddho lokān samāhartum iha pravṛttaḥ | | ṛte 'pi tvā na bhaviṣyanti sarve ye 'vasthitāḥ pratyanīkeṣu yodhāḥ ||

BG_11.033.canonical_text: tasmāt tvam uttiṣṭha yaśo labhasva jitvā śatrūn bhuṅkṣva rājyaṃ samṛddham | | mayaivaite nihatāḥ pūrvam eva nimittamātraṃ bhava savyasācin ||

variants.reading_a: tasmāt tvam uttiṣṭha yaśo labhasva jitvā śatrūn bhuṅkṣva rājyaṃ samṛddham | | mayaivaite nihatāḥ pūrvam eva nimittamātraṃ bhava savyasācin ||

BG_11.034.canonical_text: droṇaṃ ca bhīṣmaṃ ca jayadrathaṃ ca karṇaṃ tathānyān api yodhamukhyān | | mayā hatāṃs tvaṃ jahi mā vyathiṣṭhāḥ yudhyasva jetāsi raṇe sapatnān ||

variants.reading_a: droṇaṃ ca bhīṣmaṃ ca jayadrathaṃ ca karṇaṃ tathānyān api yodhamukhyān | | mayā hatāṃs tvaṃ jahi mā vyathiṣṭhāḥ yudhyasva jetāsi raṇe sapatnān ||

BG_11.035.canonical_text: etac chrutvā vacanaṃ keśavasya kṛtāñjalir vepamānaḥ kirīṭī | | namaskṛtvā bhūya evāha kṛṣṇaṃ sagadgadaṃ bhītabhītaḥ praṇamya ||

variants.reading_a: etac chrutvā vacanaṃ keśavasya kṛtāñjalir vepamānaḥ kirīṭī | | namaskṛtvā bhūya evāha kṛṣṇaṃ sagadgadaṃ bhītabhītaḥ praṇamya ||

BG_11.036.canonical_text: sthāne hṛṣīkeśa tava prakīrtyā jagat prahṛṣyaty anurajyate ca | | rakṣāṃsi bhītāni diśo dravanti sarve namasyanti ca siddhasaṅghāḥ ||

variants.reading_a: sthāne hṛṣīkeśa tava prakīrtyā jagat prahṛṣyaty anurajyate ca | | rakṣāṃsi bhītāni diśo dravanti sarve namasyanti ca siddhasaṅghāḥ ||

BG_11.037.canonical_text: tvam ādidevaḥ puruṣaḥ purāṇas tvam asya viśvasya paraṃ nidhānam |

variants.reading_a: tvam ādidevaḥ puruṣaḥ purāṇas tvam asya viśvasya paraṃ nidhānam |

BG_11.038.canonical_text: vettāsi vedyaṃ ca paraṃ ca dhāma tvayā tataṃ viśvam anantarūpa ||

BG_11.039.canonical_text: namo namas te 'stu sahasrakṛtvaḥ punaś ca bhūyo 'pi namo namas te ||

BG_11.040.canonical_text: namaḥ purastād atha pṛṣṭhatas te namo 'stu te sarvata eva sarva | | anantavīryāmitavikramas tvaṃ sarvaṃ samāpnoṣi tato 'si sarvaḥ ||

variants.reading_a: namaḥ purastād atha pṛṣṭhatas te namo 'stu te sarvata eva sarva | | anantavīryāmitavikramas tvaṃ sarvaṃ samāpnoṣi tato 'si sarvaḥ ||

BG_11.041.canonical_text: sakheti matvā prasabhaṃ yad uktaṃ he kṛṣṇa he yādava he sakheti | | ajānatā mahimānaṃ tavemaṃ mayā pramādāt praṇayena vāpi ||

variants.reading_a: sakheti matvā prasabhaṃ yad uktaṃ he kṛṣṇa he yādava he sakheti | | ajānatā mahimānaṃ tavemaṃ mayā pramādāt praṇayena vāpi ||

BG_11.042.canonical_text: yaś cāpahāsārtham asatkṛto 'si vihāraśayyāsanabhojaneṣu | | eko 'tha vāpy acyuta tatsamakṣaṃ tat kṣāmaye tvām aham aprameyam ||

variants.reading_a: yaś cāpahāsārtham asatkṛto 'si vihāraśayyāsanabhojaneṣu | | eko 'tha vāpy acyuta tatsamakṣaṃ tat kṣāmaye tvām aham aprameyam ||

BG_11.043.canonical_text: pitāsi lokasya carācarasya tvam asya pūjyaś ca guru garīyān | | na tvatsamo 'sty abhyadhikaḥ kuto 'nyo lokatraye 'py apratimaprabhāva ||

variants.reading_a: pitāsi lokasya carācarasya tvam asya pūjyaś ca guru garīyān | | na tvatsamo 'sty abhyadhikaḥ kuto 'nyo lokatraye 'py apratimaprabhāva ||

BG_11.044.canonical_text: tasmāt praṇamya praṇidhāya kāryaṃ prasādaye tvām aham īśam īḍyam | | piteva putrasya sakheva sakhyuḥ priyaḥ priyāyārhasi deva soḍhum ||

variants.reading_a: tasmāt praṇamya praṇidhāya kāryaṃ prasādaye tvām aham īśam īḍyam | | piteva putrasya sakheva sakhyuḥ priyaḥ priyāyārhasi deva soḍhum ||

BG_11.045.canonical_text: adṛṣṭapūrvaṃ hṛṣito 'smi dṛṣṭvā bhayena ca pravyathitaṃ mano me | | tad eva me darśaya deva rūpaṃ prasīda deveśa jagannivāsa ||

variants.reading_a: adṛṣṭapūrvaṃ hṛṣito 'smi dṛṣṭvā bhayena ca pravyathitaṃ mano me | | tad eva me darśaya deva rūpaṃ prasīda deveśa jagannivāsa ||

BG_11.046.canonical_text: kirīṭinaṃ gadinaṃ cakrahastam icchāmi tvāṃ draṣṭum ahaṃ tathaiva | | tenaiva rūpeṇa caturbhujena sahasrabāho bhava viśvamūrte ||

variants.reading_a: kirīṭinaṃ gadinaṃ cakrahastam icchāmi tvāṃ draṣṭum ahaṃ tathaiva | | tenaiva rūpeṇa caturbhujena sahasrabāho bhava viśvamūrte ||

BG_11.047.canonical_text: mayā prasannena tavārjunedaṃ rūpaṃ paraṃ darśitam ātmayogāt | | tejomayaṃ viśvam anantam ādyaṃ yan me tvadanyena na dṛṣṭapūrvam ||

variants.reading_a: mayā prasannena tavārjunedaṃ rūpaṃ paraṃ darśitam ātmayogāt | | tejomayaṃ viśvam anantam ādyaṃ yan me tvadanyena na dṛṣṭapūrvam ||
variants.reading_b: mayā prasannena tavārjunedaṃ | rūpaṃ paraṃ darśitam ātma-yogāt | | tejo-mayaṃ viśvam anantam | ādyaṃ yan me tvad-anyena na dṛṣṭa-pūrvam

BG_11.048.canonical_text: na vedayajñādhyayanair na dānair na ca kriyābhir na tapobhir ugraiḥ | | evaṃrūpaś śakya ahaṃ nṛloke draṣṭuṃ tvadanyena kurupravīra ||

variants.reading_a: na vedayajñādhyayanair na dānair na ca kriyābhir na tapobhir ugraiḥ | | evaṃrūpaś śakya ahaṃ nṛloke draṣṭuṃ tvadanyena kurupravīra ||
variants.reading_b: na veda yajñādhyayanair na dānair | na ca kriyābhir na tapobhir ugraiḥ | | evaṃ-rūpaḥ śakya ahaṃ nṛ-loke | draṣṭuṃ tvad-anyena kuru-pravīra

variants.reading_a: na vedayajñādhyayanair na dānair na ca kriyābhir na tapobhir ugraiḥ | | evaṃrūpaś śakya ahaṃ nṛloke draṣṭuṃ tvadanyena kurupravīra ||

BG_11.049.canonical_text: mā te vyathā mā ca vimūḍhabhāvo dṛṣṭvā rūpaṃ ghoram īdṛṅ mamedam | | vyapetabhīḥ prītamanāḥ punas tvaṃ tad eva me rūpam idaṃ prapaśya ||

variants.reading_a: mā te vyathā mā ca vimūḍhabhāvo dṛṣṭvā rūpaṃ ghoram īdṛṅ mamedam | | vyapetabhīḥ prītamanāḥ punas tvaṃ tad eva me rūpam idaṃ prapaśya ||

BG_11.050.canonical_text: ity arjunaṃ vāsudevas tathoktvā svakaṃ rūpaṃ darśayām āsa bhūyaḥ | | āśvāsayām āsa ca bhītam enaṃ bhūtvā punas saumyavapur mahātmā ||

BG_11.051.canonical_text: dṛṣṭvedaṃ mānuṣaṃ rūpaṃ tava saumyaṃ janārdana | | idānīm asmi saṃvṛttaḥ sacetāḥ prakṛtiṃ gataḥ ||

BG_18.061.canonical_text: īśvaraḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ hṛddeśe 'rjuna tiṣṭhati / | bhrāmayan sarvabhūtāni yantrārūḍhāni māyayā

variants.reading_a: īśvaraḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ hṛddeśe 'rjuna tiṣṭhati / | bhrāmayan sarvabhūtāni yantrārūḍhāni māyayā

BG_18.062.canonical_text: tam eva śaraṇaṃ gaccha sarvabhāvena bhārata / | tatprasādāt parāṃ śāntiṃ sthānaṃ prāpsyasi śāśvatam

variants.reading_a: tam eva śaraṇaṃ gaccha sarvabhāvena bhārata / | tatprasādāt parāṃ śāntiṃ sthānaṃ prāpsyasi śāśvatam

BG_18.063.canonical_text: iti te jñānam ākhyātaṃ guhyād guhyataraṃ mayā / | vimṛśyaitad aśeṣeṇa yathecchasi tathā kuru

variants.reading_a: iti te jñānam ākhyātaṃ guhyād guhyataraṃ mayā / | vimṛśyaitad aśeṣeṇa yathecchasi tathā kuru

BG_18.064.canonical_text: sarvaguhyatamaṃ bhūyaḥ śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ / | iṣṭo 'si me dṛḍham iti tato vakṣyāmi te hitam

variants.reading_a: sarvaguhyatamaṃ bhūyaḥ śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ / | iṣṭo 'si me dṛḍham iti tato vakṣyāmi te hitam

BG_18.065.canonical_text: manmanā bhava madbhakto madyājī māṃ namaskuru / | mām evaiṣyasi satyaṃ te pratijāne priyo 'si me

variants.reading_a: manmanā bhava madbhakto madyājī māṃ namaskuru / | mām evaiṣyasi satyaṃ te pratijāne priyo 'si me

BG_18.066.canonical_text: sarvadharmān parityajya mām ekaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja / | ahaṃ tvā sarvapāpebhyo mokṣayiṣyāmi mā śucaḥ

variants.reading_a: sarvadharmān parityajya mām ekaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja / | ahaṃ tvā sarvapāpebhyo mokṣayiṣyāmi mā śucaḥ
variants.reading_b: sarvadharmān parityajya mām ekaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja | | ahaṃ tvā sarvapāpebhyo mokṣyayiṣyāmi mā śucaḥ

BG_18.067.canonical_text: idaṃ te nātapaskāya nābhaktāya kadācana / | na cāśuśrūṣave vācyaṃ na ca māṃ yo 'bhyasūyati

variants.reading_a: idaṃ te nātapaskāya nābhaktāya kadācana / | na cāśuśrūṣave vācyaṃ na ca māṃ yo 'bhyasūyati

BG_18.068.canonical_text: ya idaṃ paramaṃ guhyaṃ madbhakteṣv abhidhāsyati / | bhaktiṃ mayi parāṃ kṛtvā mām evaiṣyaty asaṃśayaḥ

BG_18.069.canonical_text: na ca tasmān manuṣyeṣu kaścin me priyakṛttamaḥ / | bhavitā na ca me tasmād anyaḥ priyataro bhuvi

variants.reading_a: na ca tasmān manuṣyeṣu kaścin me priyakṛttamaḥ / | bhavitā na ca me tasmād anyaḥ priyataro bhuvi

BG_18.070.canonical_text: adhyeṣyate ca ya imaṃ dharmyaṃ saṃvādam āvayoḥ / | jñānayajñena tenāham iṣṭaḥ syām iti me matiḥ

variants.reading_a: adhyeṣyate ca ya imaṃ dharmyaṃ saṃvādam āvayoḥ / | jñānayajñena tenāham iṣṭaḥ syām iti me matiḥ

BG_18.071.canonical_text: śraddhāvān anasūyuś ca śṛṇuyād api yo naraḥ / | so 'pi muktaḥ śubhāṃl lokān prāpnuyāt puṇyakarmaṇām

BG_18.072.canonical_text: kaścid etacchrutaṃ pārtha tvayaikāgreṇa cetasā / | kaccid ajñānasaṃmohaḥ pranaṣṭas te dhanañjaya

variants.reading_a: kaścid etacchrutaṃ pārtha tvayaikāgreṇa cetasā / | kaccid ajñānasaṃmohaḥ pranaṣṭas te dhanañjaya

BG_18.073.canonical_text: naṣṭo mohaḥ smṛtir labdhā tvatprasādān mayācyuta / | sthito 'smi gatasaṃdehaḥ kariṣye vacanaṃ tava

BG_18.074.canonical_text: ity ahaṃ vāsudevasya pārthasya ca mahātmanaḥ / | saṃvādam imam aśrauṣam adbhutaṃ romaharṣaṇam

variants.reading_a: ity ahaṃ vāsudevasya pārthasya ca mahātmanaḥ / | saṃvādam imam aśrauṣam adbhutaṃ romaharṣaṇam

BG_18.075.canonical_text: vyāsaprasādāc chrutavān etad guhyam ahaṃ param / | yogaṃ yogeśvarāt kṛṣṇāt sākṣāt kathayataḥ svayam

BG_18.076.canonical_text: rājan saṃsmṛtya saṃsmṛtya saṃvādam imam adbhutam / | keśavārjunayoḥ puṇyaṃ hṛṣyāmi ca muhur muhuḥ

variants.reading_a: rājan saṃsmṛtya saṃsmṛtya saṃvādam imam adbhutam / | keśavārjunayoḥ puṇyaṃ hṛṣyāmi ca muhur muhuḥ
variants.reading_b: rājan saṃsmṛtya saṃsmṛtya saṃvādam imam adbhutam | | keśavārjunayoḥ puṇyaṃ hṛṣyāmi ca muhur muhuḥ

BG_18.077.canonical_text: tac ca saṃsmṛtya saṃsmṛtya rūpam atyadbhutaṃ hareḥ / | vismayo me mahān rājan hṛṣyāmi ca punaḥ punaḥ

BG_18.078.canonical_text: yatra yogeśvaraḥ kṛṣṇo yatra pārtho dhanurdharaḥ / | tatra śrīr vijayo bhūtir dhruvā nītir matir mama
